response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile full-stack engineer with 10+ years across web, mobile, and embedded work, but the profile does not align with a Principal/IC6 Growth & Experimentation Systems role. There is no demonstrated experience building experimentation frameworks, feature-flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or A/B testing and statistical analysis platforms, and no evidence of principal-level architectural leadership across multiple teams at enterprise scale. Most senior titles are 'Senior/Staff Developer' at small-to-mid companies focused on product delivery rather than foundational growth-measurement systems.
strengths: Broad multi-language background (JS/TS, C, C++, C#, Java) satisfying language requirements
High-scale exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency services)
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: No experimentation, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
Limited evidence of principal-level cross-team architectural leadership at scale
Weak fit on data/statistical-analysis aptitude and current career gap since Oct 2025
